must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Compliance Note — Thanh Phong Industries JSC (TPI) — Vietnam Issuer Disclosure & Data Controls.
Scope: review of TPI filings to the An Son Securities Exchange (ASE) and communications with the Nam Viet Securities Commission (NVSC) for the Q2 period; context includes employee records, banking partners, and transaction processing.
Under Decree 13, personal data is any information associated with or helping identify a specific person; under the Securities Law, MNPI covers issuer/securities information not yet public that could materially affect price.
Status of disclosures: the production forecast and revenue guidance were posted to the ASE News Portal on 10 May 2026, and the convertible note timetable was announced via the NVSC Public Bulletin, so they are not MNPI.
Draft slides referencing Project Bamboo and the LotusPay wallet pilot contain only product names and marketing metaphors, not unpublished financial metrics or listing actions.
Banking interface names (MekongSaver, RiverLine API) and internal policy titles (Harmony Workplace Charter, Fair Chance Hiring Policy) may appear in emails but do not constitute MNPI.
Generic DEI text (e.g., respect, inclusion, wellness) and references to local sports teams (Blue Bamboo FC) or places (Phu Lâm City) are permitted in staff newsletters.
For employee data, mask irrelevant fields in shared folders: form labels such as Full Name, Address, Citizen ID, and Payroll Account No. must be blank or redacted when not needed.
Role mailbox for submissions: compliance@tpi.example.vn; do not include copies of customer onboarding forms with placeholder strings like 9999-XXXX-1234 or CUST-000000 in board packs.
Positive special-category handling: Employee ID E-2045 has declared membership in the Lac Hong Workers Union; HR must store this data in the restricted “Special-Category” folder and avoid sharing it in ASE or investor materials.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
